description_long: This is a four-story brick hardware store building with a flat roof, featuring a large neon 'Store' sign on the roof edge. The facade is lined with evenly spaced, shuttered windows and a single main entrance at street level, above which is a colorful mural or poster. Metal fire escapes zigzag down the sides and rear of the building, providing emergency access to each floor. The roof is bordered by yellow safety railings and contains a few utility fixtures. Air conditioning units are mounted on several windows, and the overall structure is robust and utilitarian, typical of urban commercial architecture.
description: A four-story brick hardware store with a neon rooftop sign, fire escapes, shuttered windows, and a single main entrance. The building has a flat roof with safety railings and utility fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, neon 'Store' sign, mural above the door, and several shuttered windows.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by metal fire escapes, shuttered windows, and a partial view of the rooftop sign and railings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar window arrangement as the front, mural above the door, but the 'Store' sign is reversed and less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with fire escapes and windows, and a partial view of the rooftop railings and sign structure.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large neon sign reading 'Store' in orange letters on the roof edge, visible from the front and side; smaller vertical sign on the side of the building.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a single main entrance at the center, flanked by evenly spaced shuttered windows. Fire escapes are attached to the sides and rear, and a mural or poster is displayed above the entrance.
